title: Exact-arithmetic certificates for three autoconvolution inequalities, with machine-verified re-evaluations of four published constructions
description: Machine-verified, exact-rational bounds for the three autoconvolution inequality constants popularized by the recent AI-search literature: C1 <= 1.5028503020710078765191888, C2 >= 0.9629011010961756912885013, and C3 <= 1.452304333183157960701885, each an explicit rational evaluated in exact integer arithmetic (Kronecker-substitution convolution up to n = 524288) with no floating-point operation on any certified path. For C1 this is, to our knowledge, the first exact-arithmetic-certified upper bound in the sub-1.51 regime; for C3, the first rigorously certified nontrivial bound for the signed variant. Four published construction vectors are additionally re-certified exactly. The repository includes the full verification package (scripts, input vectors, certificates).
